stance: Peaceful Trader with a penchant for negotiation and cultural exchange.
vita: Born on the lush planet Velara, I was raised to appreciate artistry in all forms. As an adept communicator among my people's star-faring community, diplomacy has always been second nature to me; we Vel’Ar prioritize harmony and understanding above conflict. My home world is rich with diverse flora that inspires our unique approach to aesthetics in art and design.
portrait_prompt: A velvety-skinned, statuesque figure stands poised against the backdrop of Velara's iridescent sky; transparent wings subtly shimmer with hues reflecting my home planet’de vibrant flora. The eyes hold a depth that mirrors our deep respect for life and beauty.
